tags.name: taf-icon
tags.description: Loads an icon asynchronously, caching the result for future uses

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the icon, this is relative to the assets folder of the system

attributes.name: path
attributes.description: The full path of the icon, this will only be used if `name` isn't provided or fails to fetch.

tags.name: taf-svg
tags.description: Loads an SVG file asynchronously, caching the result for future uses

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the icon, this is relative to the assets folder of the system

attributes.name: path
attributes.description: The full path of the icon, this will only be used if `name` isn't provided or fails to fetch.

tags.name: taf-toggle
tags.description: A conveniency component for a toggle switch

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The type of toggle that this should be

values.name: round
values.description: The slider is a full circle
